title: hieracium mougeotii subsp. sonchoides
intro: Hieracium mougeotii subsp. sonchoides, also known as hawkweed, is a plant species within the dandelion-like plants. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, offering potential health benefits such as wound healing, immune system support, and anti-cancer effects. In herbal preparations, hawkweed is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential skin irritation and interactions with other medications.
